strategy.principle: Ship a narrow, reliable personal AI operating system before scaling infrastructure complexity.
sequence: Harden local MVP around memory, planning, approvals, autonomy, and security.
Release private alpha to a small technical user group.
Expand to beta with billing, observability, integrations, and operational runbooks.
Move from local/simple deployment to production-grade cloud infrastructure only after product behavior is proven.

release_plan.name: MVP Local
release_plan.goal: Make the current local app complete, testable, and coherent for one user.
entry_criteria: Frontend can create goals, search memory, and use chat
exit_criteria: All critical flows pass manual verification
No stale demo data in core app screens
README and stack contract match runtime

release_plan.name: Private Alpha
release_plan.goal: Validate daily usage with 5-10 trusted users.
entry_criteria: Memory hard-delete and security status verified
exit_criteria: Weekly retention from at least 3 users
Approval and memory UX issues triaged

release_plan.name: Beta
release_plan.goal: Prepare for broader usage with observability, billing foundation, and integrations.
entry_criteria: Alpha feedback converted into prioritized backlog
exit_criteria: Hosted app has health, readiness, stack, and roadmap endpoints
At least one external integration is encrypted and revocable

release_plan.name: General Availability
release_plan.goal: Launch a stable product with operational gates and support process.
exit_criteria: 99% weekly uptime target met during launch window
Support and incident response process active
Cost per active user measured and reviewed weekly

deliverables: Manual QA checklist for goals, memory, chat, approvals, autonomy
Fix highest-severity UI/API defects
Remove stale placeholder states from critical surfaces
One-command local startup documentation
Complete smoke test script for backend endpoints
Private alpha feedback form and issue labels
Seed-user onboarding flow
Memory import/export audit
Autonomy mode guidance in settings
Weekly reflection digest surfaced to users
Approval rejection reason capture
Alpha bug triage and roadmap refresh
Production environment variables and deployment runbook
Error tracking and structured request logging
Backup and restore drill for PostgreSQL
GitHub or calendar integration with encrypted tokens
Integration disconnect and token revocation UX
Cost and token usage dashboard
Security review checklist complete
Load test baseline
Incident response and rollback exercises
Public onboarding docs
Support workflow
Launch metrics review and phase 13 feedback loop input

allowed_debt: Local mock LLM fallback for development
Optional production adapters not configured locally
not_allowed_debt: Stale demo data in core workflows

manual_actions.action: Provide real OpenAI or compatible LLM credentials when moving beyond local mock mode
Choose hosting target and production domain
Create production secret values outside the repository
Recruit 5-10 trusted alpha users and collect weekly feedback

success_metrics.activation: User creates first goal and memory within first session
success_metrics.retention: At least 3 alpha users return weekly
success_metrics.quality: At least 80% of generated tasks are accepted or edited lightly
success_metrics.reliability: Backend tests and frontend build pass before every release
